disclaimer: Does not constitute investment advice. Does not compute ROI, profit, alpha, win-rate, edge, or outperformance. Governance / review only. No production DB writes. No automatic approval granted.

strategies.name: Strategy A
strategies.description: Set releaseDate fields to NULL (soft rollback)

residualRisks.title: Schema migration breaks existing queries
residualRisks.mitigation: P14 query gate proposal covers RuleBasedStockAnalyzer (HIGH risk) and FundamentalResearchService (HIGH risk) — both require explicit code patch in P16.
residualRisks.approvalImpact: Blocking if patches not applied before migration

residualRisks.title: Backfill inference introduces systematic date bias
residualRisks.mitigation: Field declared as releaseDateSource=INFERRED with confidence LOW_TO_MEDIUM. Query gate checks releaseDateSource; authoritative data can override.
residualRisks.approvalImpact: Non-blocking if confidence field is populated correctly

residualRisks.title: Query gate regression — existing tests fail after patch
residualRisks.mitigation: P14 fixture dry-run 11/11 PASS covers all gate edge cases. Test coverage must be verified again post-patch in P16.
residualRisks.approvalImpact: Blocking if full suite drops below baseline

residualRisks.title: Historical replay comparability affected by releaseDate backfill
residualRisks.mitigation: Frozen corpus files (P0/P1/P3/P4) are not modified. Replay comparability is maintained by design — frozen lines verified: P0=4500, P1=9900, P3=4500.
residualRisks.approvalImpact: Non-blocking if frozen corpus verified unchanged

residualRisks.title: Rollback incomplete — column DROP may lose backfilled data
residualRisks.mitigation: P14 rollback draft includes Strategy A (set fields to NULL) as soft rollback. Strategy B (drop) is documented as hard rollback requiring explicit decision.

residualRisks.title: Production DB safety — unintended writes during migration
residualRisks.mitigation: All P14 utilities hardcode productionApplyAllowed=false. P15 utilities maintain this invariant. P16 requires explicit approval token to unlock.
residualRisks.approvalImpact: Hard blocker — must not be bypassed

residualRisks.title: PIT leakage residual — releaseDate not yet enforced in production code
residualRisks.mitigation: P14 query gate proposal documents all three patch targets. Patches are proposed but not applied — requires P16 schema migration first.
residualRisks.approvalImpact: Non-blocking for approval review — leakage documented and mitigated in P16 plan

residualRisks.title: Reason/scoring downstream impact from releaseDate enforcement
residualRisks.mitigation: P15 review confirms scoring formula and alphaScore/recommendationBucket are NOT modified. Impact limited to data availability — not formula changes.
residualRisks.approvalImpact: Non-blocking if scoring formulas are not changed

requiredApproverAction: Review this artifact and P15 risk register. If satisfied, provide explicit token: P14_APPROVE_SCHEMA_MIGRATION_DRY_RUN_ONLY to unlock P16 implementation.
recommendedApprovalTokenNote: This is a TEXT RECOMMENDATION only. This review artifact does NOT grant approval. Token must be provided explicitly by authorized operator (CTO/CEO).
whyNoMigrationApplied: Approval token P14_APPROVE_SCHEMA_MIGRATION_DRY_RUN_ONLY was NOT present in P14.
P15 is a governance/review phase only — no migration implementation.
productionApplyAllowed is hardcoded false on all P14 draft artifacts.
Schema migration requires explicit approval token to be provided by operator in P16.
Frozen corpora (P0/P1/P3/P4) must not be modified without separate approval.
